description:
Our REST API lets you access to resources and perform actions on behalf of a store.
For more information, read our [integration guidelines](https://help.judge.me/en/articles/8278390-integrating-with-judge-me) and [FAQs](https://help.judge.me/en/articles/8278477-faqs-for-integration-partners), or contact partnerships@judge.me for help.

# Authentication
Pass your API token in the `X-Api-Token` HTTP header (recommended):
```
curl -H "X-Api-Token: YOUR_API_TOKEN" https://api.judge.me/api/v1/widgets/product_review?shop_domain=example.myshopify.com&id=123
```

## OAuth
[Judge.me](http://judge.me/) uses OAuth2 to grant App Developers access to [Judge.me](http://judge.me/) API. You need to use the OAuth api_token generated from the Judge.me app [following this guide](https://help.judge.me/en/articles/8283047-setting-up-the-oauth-flow-for-your-app-in-judge-me).
Example of how to authenticate with OAuth:
```
GET https://app.judge.me/oauth/authorize?client_id=[your_client_id]&redirect_uri=[your_redirect_uri]&response_type=code&scope=[list_of_permissions_you_are_asking]&state=[state]
```

tools.name: private-replies_create
tools.description: Create a private email reply to a [Judge.me](http://judge.me/) review privately via your app interface. Required: private_reply, review_id. Optional: send_private_email.

params.name: review_id
params.description: Judge.me internal ID of the resource. Note: this ID is from Judge.me internally.

params.name: send_private_email
params.description: To indicate whether to send email to reviewer. Default is true

tools.name: replies_create
tools.description: Create a reply to a Judge.me review on the public [Judge.me](http://judge.me/) review widget via your app interface. Required: reply, review_id. Optional: send_reply_email.

params.name: review_id
params.description: Judge.me internal ID of the resource. Note: this ID is from Judge.me internally.

params.name: send_reply_email
params.description: To indicate whether to send email to reviewer. Default is `true`

tools.name: reviewers_data-request
tools.description: Data Request.

tools.name: reviewers_get
tools.description: Get information of the reviewers such as name and email. This is useful when you are building automated flow for users to follow up with reviewers. Required: id. Optional: external_id, email. Returns the ReviewersGetResponse.

params.name: id
params.description: Judge.me internal ID of the Reviewer. Set to `-1` and use `external_id` or `email` param to find Reviewer by external (Shopify) ID or by email of the Reviewer.

params.name: external_id
params.description: External (Shopify) ID of the Reviewer. Note: this is NOT internal Reviewer ID of Judge.me.

tools.name: reviewers_update
tools.description: Create or update a reviewer via your app interface. Required: id. Optional: external_id, email, reviewer. Returns the updated ReviewersUpdateResponse.

params.name: id
params.description: Judge.me internal ID of the Reviewer. Set to `-1` and use `external_id` or `email` param to find Reviewer by external (Shopify) ID or by email of the Reviewer.

params.name: external_id
params.description: External (Shopify) ID of the Reviewer. Note: this is NOT internal Reviewer ID of Judge.me.

params.name: reviewer-id
params.description: External (Shopify) ID of the resource. Note: this is NOT internal ID of Judge.me.

params.name: reviewer-unsubscribed-at
params.description: The time when user has unsubscribed to marketing emails. Blank if user still subscribes.

tools.name: reviews_create
tools.description: Create a web review in background, similar to submitting a review via the public form on product pages (no authorization required). This endpoint doesn't create any review if the store [disables web reviews](https://help.judge.me/en/articles/8375147-restricting-web-reviews). Required: body, email, name, platform, rating, shop_domain. Optional: cf_answers, id, ip_addr (plus 3 more). (public)

params.name: cf_answers
params.description: Answers to the shop's custom forms

params.name: id
params.description: External (Shopify) ID of the Product. Note: this is NOT internal Product ID of Judge.me. If blank, the review is considered as a shop-level review.

params.name: ip_addr
params.description: IP address of the reviewer, used to display location of the review. If blank, Judge.me will use IP address that makes the API request

params.name: reviewer_name_format
params.description: How the `reviewers` want to show their name publicly. Default is showing full name. `Stores` can also choose how they want to display reviewer’s names in all reviews on their stores. When showing reviews, Judge.me will choose the most restrictive option between reviewer's option and store’s option. For example, if a reviewer set their display format as all_initials while the store sets the format as last_initial, we will show the reviewer’s name as all initials, which is J.S., not John S..

tools.name: reviews_get
tools.description: Get info of a specific review. Required: id. Returns the ReviewsGetResponse.

params.name: id
params.description: Judge.me internal ID of the Review

tools.name: reviews_index
tools.description: Get info of reviews of a product. If `product_id` is not provided, return all product and store reviews of that store. Optional: per_page, page, reviewer_id (plus 2 more). Returns array of ResponseReview.

params.name: reviewer_id
params.description: Judge.me internal ID of the Reviewer

params.name: product_id
params.description: Judge.me internal ID of the Product

params.name: rating
params.description: Only include reviews with this rating

tools.name: reviews_reviewers-count
tools.description: Get count of reviews for a specific product or reviewer. If product_id is not provided, return the count of all product and store reviews of that store. Optional: reviewer_id, product_id, rating.

params.name: reviewer_id
params.description: Judge.me internal ID of the Reviewer

params.name: product_id
params.description: Judge.me internal ID of the Product

params.name: rating
params.description: Only include reviews with this rating

tools.name: reviews_update
tools.description: Publish or hide a [Judge.me](http://judge.me/) review via your app interface. For authenticity reason, we don’t support editing reviews via API. Required: id. Optional: curated. Returns the updated ReviewsUpdateResponse.

params.name: id
params.description: Judge.me internal ID of the Review

params.name: curated
params.description: value is either ok or spam: ok is for publish reviews, spam is for hide review

tools.name: settings_index
tools.description: Get multiple settings values of the store in [Judge.me](http://judge.me/), which can serve as conditions for your app integrations. Optional: setting_keys[]. Returns the SettingsIndexResponse.

tools.name: shops_comments-create
tools.description: Create a checkout comment. Available in Checkout Comments app only. Optional: content, create_from, customer (plus 1 more).

params.name: customer-external-id
params.description: External (Shopify) ID of the resource. Note: this is NOT internal ID of Judge.me.

params.name: external_product_id
params.description: External (Shopify) ID of the resource. Note: this is NOT internal ID of Judge.me.

tools.name: shops_destroy
tools.description: Uninstall the store from Judge.me. Destructive.

tools.name: shops_info
tools.description: Get the basic information of the store such as [Judge.me](http://judge.me/) plan, owner name, email, e-commerce platform, etc. This is helpful when you are developing your app for specific segment of users (e.g. your integration is only available to Judge.me Awesome users).

tools.name: shops_update
tools.description: Update store information.

tools.name: webhooks_bulk-create
tools.description: Bulk Create. Optional: webhooks.

tools.name: webhooks_create
tools.description: Create a webhook in Judge.me with a `key` and a `url`. When an event associated with `key` happens, Judge.me will send a POST request to the webhook's `url`. Optional: webhook. Returns the new WebhooksCreateResponse.

tools.name: webhooks_destroy
tools.description: Delete. Optional: key, url. Returns the WebhooksDestroyResponse. Destructive.

tools.name: webhooks_get
tools.description: Get. Required: id. Returns the WebhooksGetResponse.

params.name: id
params.description: Judge.me internal ID of the Webhook

tools.name: webhooks_index
tools.description: Index. Returns array of ResponseWebhook.

tools.name: webhooks_update
tools.description: Update. Required: id. Optional: webhook. Returns the updated WebhooksUpdateResponse.

params.name: id
params.description: Judge.me internal ID of the Webhook

tools.name: widgets_all-reviews-count
tools.description: Return a single total number of product and store reviews.

tools.name: widgets_all-reviews-page
tools.description: All Reviews Page is a dedicated page to showcase all product and store reviews all in one place. Optional: page, review_type.

params.name: review_type
params.description: Whether to show product reviews, or shop reviews, default to product reviews

tools.name: widgets_all-reviews-rating
tools.description: Return a single number of average rating of product reviews and store reviews.

tools.name: widgets_checkout-comments
tools.description: Return Checkout Comments widget for a product (for Checkout Comments app only). You can use product handle, external ID, or [Judge.me](http://judge.me/) internal ID to specify the product. Optional: handle, external_id, id.

params.name: external_id
params.description: External (Shopify) ID of the Product. Note: this is NOT internal Product ID of Judge.me.

params.name: id
params.description: Judge.me internal ID of the Product

tools.name: widgets_featured-carousel
tools.description: Reviews Carousel is usually placed on the homepage to showcase specific reviews featured by the store.

tools.name: widgets_html-miracle
tools.description: Return special HTML that helps show essential parts of widgets before the JS and CSS files are loaded.

tools.name: widgets_preview-badge
tools.description: Preview Badge is usually placed below product titles on product pages or inside product thumbnails on collection pages. This widget display the average star rating and review count of each product. You can use product handle, external ID, or [Judge.me](http://judge.me/) internal ID to specify the product. Optional: handle, external_id, id.

params.name: external_id
params.description: External (Shopify) ID of the Product. Note: this is NOT internal Product ID of Judge.me.

params.name: id
params.description: Judge.me internal ID of the Product

tools.name: widgets_product-review
tools.description: Review Widget is usually placed at the bottom of each product page, displaying all reviews of a product. You can use product handle, external ID, or [Judge.me](http://judge.me/) internal ID to specify the product. Optional: handle, external_id, id (plus 2 more).

params.name: external_id
params.description: External (Shopify) ID of the Product. Note: this is NOT internal Product ID of Judge.me.

params.name: id
params.description: Judge.me internal ID of the Product

tools.name: widgets_reviews-tab
tools.description: Floating Reviews Tab display all product and store reviews via a floating button on any pages. Optional: page, per_page, review_type.

params.name: review_type
params.description: Whether to show product reviews, or shop reviews, default to product reviews

tools.name: widgets_settings
tools.description: Return widget settings of the shop, under HTML format, containing a `<script>` tag and a `<style>` tag. This contains values of widget customization in [Judge.me](http://judge.me/) such as text and color, which helps you display the widget correctly.

tools.name: widgets_shop-reviews-count
tools.description: Return a single total number of store reviews.

tools.name: widgets_shop-reviews-rating
tools.description: Return a single number of average rating of store reviews.

tools.name: widgets_verified-badge
tools.description: Verified Reviews Count Badge displays the number of verified published reviews. Stores need at least 20 verified reviews to use this widget.
